# Neomagnetar Dynamic Persona Sleeve

## What this sleeve is
Large dynamic persona sleeve with multi-domain trigger routing and 100+ blocks.

## Category
coders

## What makes it unique
This sleeve is specialized around these areas: research, strategy, builder, governance, relationship, creative, sales, crisis, core.
It uses trigger-based routing with 8 trigger(s).

## What to open next
- `sleeve.json` - actual source JSON
- `STRUCTURE.md` - high-level structure summary
- `NEOSTACKS.md` - stack-level breakdown
- `NEOBLOCKS.md` - inferred neoblock grouping by stack
- `MOLT-BLOCKS.md` - block inventory in natural language
